content.text:
I've opened the SalesByCategory view — it shows categories ranked by revenue. 

Would you like me to:
- Show the bottom 3 categories by revenue,
- Show the bottom 5,
- Compare current vs previous year (SalesByCategoryWithPrevYear), or
- Drill into product-level sales for the low-performing categories (TopProductsByCategory)?

Also tell me which year (2024 or 2025) to use.
